body:
## Summary

- Require signed and notarized macOS release artifacts, build both macOS x64 and arm64 DMGs, and block unsigned macOS uploads with a clear missing-secrets error.
- Smoke-test Linux, macOS, and Windows release artifacts on their target runners before upload, including DMG mount/copy/Gatekeeper assessment and Windows silent installer validation.
- Add stable release artifact names, direct latest-download docs, a React GitHub Pages download site with language/theme/OS detection, and a fallback OS chooser.
- Add the issue #6 case study with captured issue/PR/template data, reproduction evidence, screenshots, and the related upstream report: https://github.com/deep-foundation/sdk/issues/20.

## Validation

- `bash scripts/check-mjs-syntax.sh`
- `bash scripts/check-file-line-limits.sh`
- `npm run build:renderer`
- `npm run build:site`
- `npm run check`
- `npm test`
- `npx --yes -p secretlint -p @secretlint/secretlint-rule-preset-recommend secretlint "**/*"`
- Playwright MCP desktop and mobile render checks for `site/dist`
- Pre-commit `lint-staged`

## Screenshots

![Pages desktop](https://github.com/konard/vk-bot-desktop/blob/issue-6-4b296eea2cf6/docs/screenshots/issue-6-pages-desktop.png?raw=true)

![Pages mobile](https://github.com/konard/vk-bot-desktop/blob/issue-6-4b296eea2cf6/docs/screenshots/issue-6-pages-mobile.png?raw=true)

## Release Setup Required

The macOS release job now requires these repository secrets before publishing macOS artifacts: `MAC_CSC_LINK`, `MAC_CSC_KEY_PASSWORD`, `APPLE_API_KEY`, `APPLE_API_KEY_ID`, and `APPLE_API_ISSUER`.


Fixes #6
